evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: We believe in Always Be Shipping, and AI brings that philosophy to life across every team, every role, every day.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Multiple velocity phrases ("Always Be Shipping", "fast-moving", "move faster", "priorities shift and ambiguity is part of the job") dominate with no testing/governance/compliance signals, giving velocity.
evidence.domain_risk: The analytics work done here feeds directly into how commercial teams make decisions, assign leads, and manage performance.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Errors affect commercial decision-making (lead assignment, performance management) but there is no financial reporting, regulatory, or compliance language despite Mollie being a payments company.
evidence.data_team_maturity: RevOps has recently adopted a full domain model and is being rebuilt as a proper product and engineering function.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The domain is explicitly described as actively growing and being rebuilt, with named tools (HubSpot, Omni, Looker, Tableau) in responsibilities, indicating a mid-stage, maturing function rather than early or fully mature.
evidence.jd_authorship: Own and maintain HubSpot data models; Reduce dashboard sprawl by establishing centralised, standardised reporting in Omni
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Bullets name specific tools and precise application context (HubSpot data models, Omni, CSM/Merchant Sales domains), letting the reader understand what the person does day to day.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Revenue Operations at Mollie serves around 200 internal stakeholders across sales, customer success, marketing, and partnerships.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The explicit audience is sales, customer success, marketing, and partnerships — all commercial/GTM functions.
evidence.autonomy_level: There is real space here to shape how analytics is delivered to commercial stakeholders, not just execute on requests. ... You will be the analytics engineering support for the team's projects.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role combines strategic ownership of the GTM reporting domain ("own reporting", "shape how analytics is delivered") with an execution-support function for team projects, giving a mixed autonomy profile.
evidence.ai_role: We're looking for people who are excited to use AI to shape the future of finance with us.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The company's 'Always Be Shipping' AI philosophy centers on using AI to move faster in the candidate's own work, matching the ai_user pattern rather than building AI-consuming infrastructure.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal present.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No mention of dbt tests, data contracts, Great Expectations, Soda, or any data quality framework anywhere in the JD.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed entirely in delivery, ownership, and shipping-speed terms with no risk register, compliance, or reliability language, matching none.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: RevOps has recently adopted a full domain model and is being rebuilt as a proper product and engineering function.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The domain is being rebuilt from a prior reactive state while the candidate also owns and maintains existing dashboards, giving a mixed greenfield/fix signal.
evidence.language_gate: Apply with your CV (in English) using the form below.
